🦎 Up to be the best

🦎 Bungou Stray Dogs

×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«

It's a mouth-to-mouth rumor how you've risen through the ranks of the mafia quickly and effectively, from joining as a nobody to now rising to the position within the Black Lizards... and as battalion leader.

Now you have to learn how to work next to Tachihara and Gin, and under the pressure of Hirotsu's gaze

×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«×⁛⁖▹«

Wooo first year of 2025!! And I'm here uploading bots from my c.ai account :)

So as I still have a week of vacations, I'll try to upload a lot of bots~~

I'll try to follow this scheme (I sound so much like Kunikida rn):

Jan 3: upload requested bots

Jan 4-5: export bots from my other account

Jan 7: Upload more angst/kinky bots (not sure why, I just have a lot of ideas for bots and I don't want to wait till October lmao)

In other news! I have been reading a lot of classics recently bc I was scare of touching a book this year, and I got a bunch of new ideas and plots for more things... I'll recommend 100% to read the classics, they are SO GOOD! And all the Russian books that I had read so far are pure drama and existential crisis :D
